rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF LINNETT FAYE JONES
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
rulings.Rulings: continued to 11/26/19. the examiner continues to review the accounting, however there are some threshold issues: no bank statements filed to verify the ending balances as required by local rule; both petitioner and attorney request additional compensation when the statutory fees are almost $72,000 each, so each must file time slips showing the time spent on ordinary services, and petiitoner must break down her time in smaller increments than full hours; no legal basis provided for the Court to bypass the terms of the Will that devise the residue to the testamentary trust. deadline for responding to these and any additional notes (to be sent by 11/6/19) is noon on 11/19/19.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF HAZEL L. OLCUTT
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
rulings.Rulings: Grant without hearing, although the supplement filed on 10/23/19 "amended" the petition [CRC 7.3] and did not, in fact, stand on its own, as directed, but referred explicitly to "Probate Notes" that are not filed for the record. Estate cannot be distributed until a personal representative is appointed for the post-deceased daughter who is the devisee of the real property and its contents. Status of closing the estate is set for 5/5/21.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF MICHAEL ADOLFF JONES
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 12/4/19. Courtesy copies of the new petition and objections must be received by the assigned Examiner by no later than 11/26/19. [LRSF 2.7 B. and 14.93 G.] The first petition filed by Ida Mae Jones must be supplemented to complete item 6 of the petition, as the decedent was survived by a spouse but no issue, complete item 8 with the identity of the decedent's father and/or his date of death if he is deceased, and to submit the waivers of bond that were not affixed as Attachment 3e(3). A courtesy copy of the supplement must be received by the reviewing Examiner by no later than 11/26/19.
